text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, you certainly seem to enjoy<n>staring off
into the distance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, such a frigid response is exactly<n>what
produces that aura of ennui.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I'm onto you. I know what your eyes<n>are
searching for.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That's right. I've noticed... you're lookingat me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Those eyes are always seeking me out, in<n>
desperate search of their guiding star!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It appears I've hit the<n>nail on the
head!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you credit. When it comes to<n>
confidence—no, delusion—no one does<n>it better.
